modules.name: vsl_ial.image_metric
documentation:
Usage example:

statistics = image_metric(
    convert(sRGB(), XYZ(), A),
    convert(sRGB(), XYZ(), B),
    filter_color_space=Opponent(),
    spacial_filters=(create_gauss_kernel_2d(1.0), create_gauss_kernel_2d(1.0), create_gauss_kernel_2d(1.0)),
    metric_color_space=CIELAB(illuminant_xyz=D65))

methods.name: vsl_ial.cs.cielab.CIELAB.distance_ciede2000

functions.name: vsl_ial.image_appearance_model.icam06.iCAM06_HDR
documentation:
Parameters
----------
p : power value for tone compression
    (adjust contrast of the rendered image output).
    Can be set in a range [0.6,0.85],
    the larger value generates higher contrast.

gamma_value : surround parameter (power value for I channel in IPT CS),
              1.5 stands for dark surround, 1.25 -- dim, 1.0 -- average.

functions.name: vsl_ial.image_appearance_model.icam06.rgb_to_xyz_like_in_article
documentation: max_L: maximum luminance of the input image, in cd/m2 or nits.
